title: Japanese-Style Uruguayan Rice Bowl
description: A unique fusion dish combining the flavors of Japan and Uruguay. This recipe features a savory rice bowl topped with grilled uruguayan meat and a tangy mustardy sauce.
instructions: Season the uruguayan meat with salt, pepper, and a dusting of pillowy flour.
Grill the meat for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, prepare the rice according to package instructions.
To make the mustardy sauce, mix together 1/4 cup of mustard and 1/4 cup of water in a small bowl.
Slice the grilled meat into thin strips.
To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of cooked rice on a plate, followed by a few slices of grilled meat.
Drizzle the mustardy sauce over the top and serve immediately.
